issue_summary: Store raw path in FileSelector and DirectorySelector
javadoc_before:
/** * Create a {@code FileSelector} for the supplied file path. * *

This method selects the file in its {@linkplain File#getCanonicalFile() * canonical} form. * * @param path the path to the file to select; never {@code null} or blank * @see FileSelector * @see #selectFile(File) * @see #selectDirectory(String) * @see #selectDirectory(File) */
javadoc_after:
/** * Create a {@code FileSelector} for the supplied file path. * *

This method selects the file using the supplied path as is, * without verifying if the file exists. * * @param path the path to the file to select; never {@code null} or blank * @see FileSelector * @see #selectFile(File) * @see #selectDirectory(String) * @see #selectDirectory(File) */
